   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# 1. Load Data\n",
    "df = pd.read_csv('../data/cleaned_leads.csv')\n",
    "df['Lead_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Lead_Date'])\n",
    "df_conv = df[df['Conversion_Status'] == 'Converted'].copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Setup the \"Canvas\" (The 2x2 Grid)\n",
    "sns.set_style(\"whitegrid\")\n",
    "plt.rcParams.update({'font.size': 12})\n",
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(18, 12))\n",
    "fig.suptitle('Business Development Performance Dashboard', fontsize=22, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- CHART 1: Lead Source (Top Left) ---\n",
    "sns.countplot(ax=axes[0, 0], data=df, x='Lead_Source', hue='Conversion_Status', palette='Set2')\n",
    "axes[0, 0].set_title('Lead Source: Converted vs Not Converted', fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- CHART 2: Regional Revenue (Top Right) ---\n",
    "region_rev = df_conv.groupby('Region')['Revenue_Value'].sum()\n",
    "axes[0, 1].pie(region_rev, labels=region_rev.index, autopct='%1.1f%%', colors=sns.color_palette('pastel'), startangle=140)\n",
    "axes[0, 1].set_title('Revenue Share by Region', fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- CHART 3: Rep Performance (Bottom Left) ---\n",
    "sns.scatterplot(ax=axes[1, 0], data=df_conv, x='Sales_Cycle_Days', y='Revenue_Value', \n",
    "                hue='Sales_Representative', style='Sales_Representative', s=150)\n",
    "axes[1, 0].set_title('Rep Performance: Deal Size vs. Speed', fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- CHART 4: Monthly Trend (Bottom Right) ---\n",
    "monthly_trend = df.resample('M', on='Lead_Date')['Revenue_Value'].sum()\n",
    "monthly_trend.plot(kind='line', ax=axes[1, 1], marker='o', color='darkblue', linewidth=2.5)\n",
    "axes[1, 1].set_title('Monthly Revenue Growth Trend', fontweight='bold')\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# 3. Final Polish and Save\n",
    "plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0.03, 1, 0.95])\n",
    "plt.savefig('../data/kpi_dashboard_final.png', dpi=300)\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Dashboard successfully generated and saved to data/kpi_dashboard_final.png\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
